scope: machine-checkable request-class x object-class context-serving matrix derived conservatively from task-396 policy and adjacent Frame artifacts

notes: Only current task state and current-branch continuation anchors can be always_on.
Historical canonical objects remain authoritative when retrieved but are not ambiently always_on.
retrieval_document is a retrieval aid and must not outrank stronger canonical objects for the same request.
meta_artifact_projection may be consulted only as bounded support and must not replace underlying proof objects in audit or execution status serving.

task_state_current.note: top operational truth for active status, next owner, lifecycle and next bounded step

canonical_handoff_current_branch.note: current-branch continuity truth for resume basis and latest terminal package

state_summary_current_contour.note: allowed only when compact, canonical, and current; do not duplicate large history

decision_memory_note.note: retrieve only if status answer needs rationale or policy context

pattern_blocker_durable_ref_memory_note.note: retrieve when blocker interpretation or reusable pattern is directly relevant

preference_memory_note.note: normally not needed for pure status

wiki_page.note: retrieve only if status depends on a governing spec or stable synthesis

evidence_record.note: retrieve when proving completion/blocking or inspecting artifact basis

retrieval_document.note: lowest ranked allowed aid; cannot override current task or handoff truth

historical_retrieval_bundle_unscoped.note: mixed historical bundle is high-noise for status

task_state_historical.note: retrieve only for comparison or lineage, never as default status source

canonical_handoff_historical_branch.note: retrieve only to inspect older branch lineage or ambiguity

meta_artifact_projection.note: support only; cannot replace task/handoff/evidence truth

task_state_current.note: active task lifecycle still frames the reopen decision

canonical_handoff_current_branch.note: primary resume basis; includes latest relevant continuation and terminal package

state_summary_current_contour.note: use only if compact summary helps orientation and is canonical

decision_memory_note.note: retrieve if resume choice depends on prior explicit decision

pattern_blocker_durable_ref_memory_note.note: retrieve when blocker handling or durable refs matter

preference_memory_note.note: only if operator style preference changes continuation handling

wiki_page.note: retrieve only when reopen path depends on stable procedure/spec

evidence_record.note: use to verify last completed step or blocked proof

source_record.note: provenance if exact basis needs inspection

retrieval_document.note: helper only; resume must not be reconstructed from broad search

raw_transcript_tail.note: policy explicitly forbids transcript-based resume reconstruction by default

operator_summary_unanchored.note: chat summary cannot be sole reopen anchor

historical_retrieval_bundle_unscoped.note: mixed historical bundles distort bounded continuation

task_state_historical.note: retrieve only when comparing older lifecycle branches

canonical_handoff_historical_branch.note: older branch retrieval allowed for lineage and ambiguity inspection

meta_artifact_projection.note: meta projections must not replace direct continuation basis for resume

task_state_current.note: bring in only if the policy answer depends on active operational framing

canonical_handoff_current_branch.note: continuation context may support but should not dominate policy rationale

state_summary_current_contour.note: summary projection is not the governing rationale source

decision_memory_note.note: primary rationale source for explicit why/policy questions

pattern_blocker_durable_ref_memory_note.note: reusable rule/pattern layer belongs in default policy lookup pack

preference_memory_note.note: personal style matters only when policy intersects operator preference

wiki_page.note: stable synthesis/spec layer allowed by default for policy lookup

evidence_record.note: supporting proof, not primary rationale layer

operator_summary_unanchored.note: unanchored summaries do not govern policy

historical_retrieval_bundle_unscoped.note: mixed history adds noise to why-questions

task_state_historical.note: historical status only if policy question is branch-specific

meta_artifact_projection.note: support only; underlying policy objects outrank projections

task_state_current.note: task scope may frame the audit request but is not direct proof

canonical_handoff_current_branch.note: continuation anchor may narrow audit scope

state_summary_current_contour.note: summary projection must not stand in for audit evidence

decision_memory_note.note: retrieve only when audit asks why an artifact path was chosen

pattern_blocker_durable_ref_memory_note.note: supporting only if reusable blocker/pattern is explicitly relevant

preference_memory_note.note: preference memory is not part of direct source trace by default

wiki_page.note: spec context may help but is not primary proof

evidence_record.note: direct proof object should lead audit serving

source_record.note: source/provenance object is first-class for source trace requests

raw_transcript_tail.note: chat residue is not audit proof

operator_summary_unanchored.note: projection does not prove artifact provenance

historical_retrieval_bundle_unscoped.note: mixed historical bundles pollute source-trace answers

task_state_historical.note: retrieve only if historical task lineage is requested

canonical_handoff_historical_branch.note: older branch continuity may help trace provenance lineage

meta_artifact_projection.note: meta projections cannot replace proof objects in audit mode

task_state_current.note: active task context may matter secondarily

canonical_handoff_current_branch.note: continuation state should not leak into pure preference recall by default

state_summary_current_contour.note: summary projection is not durable preference memory

decision_memory_note.note: retrieve only if preference is encoded via explicit decision

pattern_blocker_durable_ref_memory_note.note: generic patterns should not masquerade as user preference

preference_memory_note.note: durable preference note is primary operating-style truth

wiki_page.note: wiki is too broad for default preference serving

evidence_record.note: evidence/proof objects are not default preference context

source_record.note: provenance objects are irrelevant to default preference recall

retrieval_document.note: weak retrieval hints must not become fake preference truth

raw_transcript_tail.note: do not infer preference from chat residue by default

operator_summary_unanchored.note: operator summary is not durable preference truth

historical_retrieval_bundle_unscoped.note: historical mixed bundle is high-risk for false preference recall

task_state_historical.note: old task states are not preference memory

canonical_handoff_historical_branch.note: old continuation branches are not preference memory

meta_artifact_projection.note: meta projections must not replace durable preference evidence

task_state_current.note: general lookup should avoid active-contour leakage by default

canonical_handoff_current_branch.note: general topic answers should not inherit current continuation state

state_summary_current_contour.note: current contour summary is not general topic context

decision_memory_note.note: mature decision memory can help stable topic recall

pattern_blocker_durable_ref_memory_note.note: reusable pattern layer is appropriate for general lookup

preference_memory_note.note: general topic recall should not inject user preference by default

wiki_page.note: stable synthesis layer is default for general topic lookup

evidence_record.note: retrieve proof objects when topic answer needs grounding

source_record.note: provenance support if exact sourcing matters

retrieval_document.note: helper layer allowed but remains low authority

operator_summary_unanchored.note: summary projection is not general topic truth

historical_retrieval_bundle_unscoped.note: mixed broad history should not ambiently drive topic answers

task_state_historical.note: historical task state is not default general-topic context

canonical_handoff_historical_branch.note: historical continuation branches are not default general-topic context

meta_artifact_projection.note: consult only as support when underlying objects are also available
